---
name: Bug report
about: A skill is misbehaving (firing when it shouldn't, missing obvious triggers, producing bad output)
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## Which skill?

Name and link to the skill folder.

## Which AI tool?

Which tool did you run this on? (e.g. Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Claude.ai web, ChatGPT Custom GPT, etc.)

## What did you expect to happen?

## What actually happened?

## How to reproduce

Paste the exact prompt you used. Include any context files or attachments that were involved.

## How did you load the skill?

(e.g. dropped into `~/.claude/skills/`, dropped into `.agents/skills/`, uploaded to a Claude Project, pasted into a Custom GPT, etc.)
